basic_details.job_title: ESIC Medical College & Hospital Bihta Teaching Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: The latest ESIC Medical College & Hospital Bihta Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Teaching Faculty posts! Published under Advt No. 423-A/12/28/2026 at esic.gov.in, this new recruitment drive offers 2 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the maximum age limit of 69 years and possessing MBBS/MD/MS qualifications with updated Medical Registration Certificate can attend the walk-in interview on 12 May 2026. Find all details about the ESIC Medical College & Hospital Bihta Teaching Faculty new vacancy 2026, including eligibility, walk-in details, and notification PDF here.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS/MD/MS Qualification(s) with up-dated Medical Registration Certificate.
qualification.details: Assistant Professor (Biochemistry): MBBS/MD/MS Qualification(s) with up-dated Medical Registration Certificate. Assistant Professor (Pathology): MBBS/MD/MS Qualification(s) with up-dated Medical Registration Certificate.

salary_details.details: Assistant Professor: Fixed Rs. 67,700/- per month

selection_process: Walk-in-interview Selection based on academic credentials and performance in interview

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies for Teaching Faculty posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Teaching Faculty positions at ESIC Medical College & Hospital Bihta.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to appear directly for the interview.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 12th May 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What are the required qualifications for the Teaching Faculty posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess MBBS/MD/MS Qualification(s) with an up-dated Medical Registration Certificate.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the candidates?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates is 69 years, and it should not be exceeded.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Teaching Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a fixed salary of Rs. 67,700/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. What are the specific posts available under Teaching Faculty?
faq.answer: The available posts are Assistant Professor in Biochemistry and Assistant Professor in Pathology.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application fee for different categories?
faq.answer: The application fee is Nil for SC/ST/Female/ESIC(Regular Employee) and Defence Ex-Servicemen & PH Candidates. For all other categories, the fee is Rs. 500/-.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview venue located?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at ESIC Medical College & Hospital Bihta, Patna, Bihar - 801103.
